name: agent-hub-channel
description: Multi-CLI session dispatch — control multiple Claude Code CLIs from your phone or other sessions

metadata.description: Route commands to any running Claude Code CLI via MCP Channel protocol

plugins.name: agent-hub-channel
plugins.description: Multi-CLI dispatch system using MCP Channel. Each CLI auto-registers on startup. Send commands from Dispatch (mobile) or other CLIs. Supports session naming, status tracking, and async response collection.
